title: Costco India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Costco India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Costco India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!
